_publications._publicationTitle: NF106: A Neurofibromatosis Clinical Trials Consortium Phase II Trial of the MEK Inhibitor Mirdametinib (PD-0325901) in Adolescents and Adults With NF1-Related Plexiform Neurofibromas.

_contextSnippet: Mean AUC 0-12h  values (± SD) of mirdametinib and PD-0315209 (metabolite) on day 1 were 443 (± 103) and 184 (± 101) (ng * h/mL), respectively.
details: Mean AUC 0-12h values (± SD) of mirdametinib and PD-0315209 (metabolite) on day 1 were 443 (± 103) and 184 (± 101) (ng * h/mL), respectively
